description_long: This is a rectangular, military-style metal toolbox with a matte olive green finish and visible signs of wear, such as scratches and a small rust spot. The box features a sturdy, folding metal handle on the top for carrying, and reinforced black metal brackets on the sides for added durability. On the front and back faces, there is a large, flat panel with stenciled yellow text reading '105 CAL.50 LINKED A.P. M2', indicating its use for storing ammunition. The lid is secured with a robust, metal latch mechanism, and the overall construction suggests it is designed to be both rugged and secure. The box appears to be a single-compartment container, with no visible external drawers or trays, and is likely hollow inside to accommodate tools or ammunition.
description: A rugged, olive green metal toolbox with a folding handle, black side brackets, and yellow stenciled text indicating military use. The box is rectangular, sturdy, and shows signs of wear.
description_view_0: The end view shows the solid, flat side of the toolbox with the folding handle visible on top and black metal brackets on the sides.
description_view_1: The front view displays the yellow stenciled text '105 CAL.50 LINKED A.P. M2' on a flat panel, with the handle and brackets clearly visible.
description_view_2: The opposite end view mirrors view 0, showing the flat side, handle, and brackets, but without any visible text.
description_view_3: The back view is nearly identical to the front, featuring the same yellow stenciled text and structural details.
attribute_handle_type: Folding rectangular steel handle, mounted on top, with a simple ergonomic grip for carrying.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Robust steel clasp latch, manually operated, with no visible keyhole or combination lock.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment, no visible trays, drawers, or dividers; compartment is implied to be hollow and undivided.
attribute_external_labeling: '105 CAL.50 LINKED A.P. M2' stenciled in yellow on the front and back panels.
